    GROUP BY strftime('%Y', releaseDate)

1482:
SELECT
    c.Segment,
    SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS Consumption_2012,
    SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS Consumption_2013,
    (SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) -
     SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) AS Increase,
    ROUND(((SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) -
            SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) /
           SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) * 100, 2) AS Percentage_Increase
FROM
    yearmonth ym
JOIN
    customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE
    c.Currency = 'EUR' AND c.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
GROUP BY
    c.Segment
ORDER BY
    Percentage_Increase DESC;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
